{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "muns judiſki preeſſch to Lauschu
Auſim/ kas us to Muhri irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Rabsakus fazzija : Irrag mans Kungs mann pee
tawn Kunqu jeb pee tew fuhtijs
ſchohs Wahrdns runnaht ? neg.
gi pee teem Wihrreem/ kas us to
Muhri fehſch/ jo tee ar jums fa-
wus Suhdns ehdihs/ un ſawas
Mihselas dsers.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad stahweja Rabsakus/
un ſauze ar ſtipru Balsi judiſki/
un fazztja : Klausajt tohs Wahr-
dus ta leela Rehnixa/ ta Rehnt-
na no Affirijas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta ſakka tas Rehnixch : Laid Iſtijus juhs ne peewitt/ jo
wiſch ne warrehs juhs igglahbt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laid arridsan Iſtijus
jums Zerribu ne darra us to
KUNGU/ ka tas buhtu fazztjs/
tas KUNGS muhs glahbtin ig-
glahbs/ ſchis Pilſtahts ne taps
ta Rehnixa no Affirijas Rohka
dohts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne klausajt pehz Iſtiju.
Jo ta ſakka tas Rehnixch no
Affirijas: Darrajt ar man Meer-
ru/ un nahzeet pee mannim ah-
ra/ un ehdeet ikweens no tawa
Wihna-Kohka / un ikweens no
fawa Wihges-Kohka/ un dserreet
ikweens to Uhdeni no tawas Ak-
kas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kamehr es nahkn / un
weddu juhs weena Semme itt
ka juhsu Semne irr / tahda
Semmê/ fur Labbiha un Wihs
irr/ tahdá Semmê/ fur Maisē
un Wihna-Dahrti irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Laid Iſtijus juhs ne pee-
witt/ ka tas gribbetu fazzibt :
tas KUNGS muhs igglahbs.
Irrag to Pagannu Deewi ifkatrs
fawu Semmi atpeſtiſchi no tahs
Rohkas ta Rehnixa no Affirijas?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kur ter tee Deewi no Ge-
mata un Arwadas? Kur irr tee
Deewi no Sewarwaam? irrag
tee arridsan Samariju no man-
nas Rohkas igglahbutchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kutri irr no wiſeem
Deetweem ſcho Semmes Walstu/
kas fawu Semmi no mannas
Rohkas irr atpeſtiſchi? ka tam
KUNGAM bij Jeruſalemni no
mannas Rohkas igpeſtiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee zeete kluffu/ un
ne atbildeja winnam ne Wahr-
du/ jo ta Rehnixa Pawehlescha-
na bija fchi/ ka wiſch bij fazz-
zijs : Jums ne buhs winnam
atbildeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze Elijakims Il-
kijus Dehls tas Aumetſteris/ un
Sebia tas Skrihwerts/ un Jo-
aks Ahava Dehls tas Kanzzle-
ris/ pee Iſtiju ar faplohsitahm
Drehbehm / un detve winnam
Sinnu no Rabsakus Wahr-
deem.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
